name: Sour Cream/Brass Hinge Floor Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add adjustable lighting to your space with this Hinge Floor Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Standing 62 inches tall, this hinged floor lamp features a white metal empire shade with vertical perforations on the rim, set on a brass-finish metal pole body on a round base. Plus, it showcases a movable arm for flexible positioning to direct light where you need it. With a six-foot cord and convenient turn knob rotary switch, this lamp works well in your living room, entryway or reading nook.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
